- The owning Entity is Task 'implementation/09-documentation-and-final-cleanup'.
- Mission observes your stdout and parses strict one-line owner-addressed signal markers deterministically.
- Every structured state signal must start at the beginning of a stdout line with task:: followed immediately by strict JSON.
- Do not use prose as a substitute for structured state signals; prose is only explanatory output.
- Use a fresh...
